title: Rose Wang’s CV
text:
[cite_start]Software Developer, Computer Science Student[cite: 1, 11, 13].

shijia.engineer@gmail.com | LinkedIn | [cite_start]385-371-0078 [cite: 2]



[cite_start]Software Developer at Brigham Young University-Idaho while pursuing a Bachelor’s in Computer Science (GPA 4.0/4.0)[cite: 11, 13].



[cite_start]Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++[cite: 5].
[cite_start]Frameworks: React, Next.js, React Native, Flask, Streamlit[cite: 6].
[cite_start]Testing & Automation: Selenium, Storybook[cite: 9].




[cite_start]Full-stack development, AI-powered dynamic gift recommendations, audio analysis functionality, and secure data layers for transactions[cite: 33, 42, 45, 46].




Apr 2025 - Expected Dec 2026 [cite_start]Brigham Young University-Idaho [cite: 11] - [cite_start]Computer Science: GPA 4.0/4.0 [cite: 11]



Oct 2025 [cite_start]2nd Place Winner, HackUSU, Sales Dashboard Factory Challenge [cite: 31] - [cite_start]Winner of the “Data App Factory” Challenge [cite: 32]



May 2025 - Present [cite_start]Software Developer, Brigham Young University-Idaho [cite: 13] - [cite_start]Maintained and enhanced 5+ production systems supporting 6+ university offices[cite: 14]. - [cite_start]Built and deployed 10+ iPaaS automations, improving data consistency[cite: 15]. - [cite_start]Partnered with 6+ departments to deliver process improvements that significantly improved support request turnaround[cite: 16].
Nov 2024 - Apr 2025 [cite_start]Software Engineer Intern, Route [cite: 17] - [cite_start]Assisted 30+ Shopify merchants with widget implementation and CSS styling[cite: 18]. - [cite_start]Solved 10+ integration issues weekly and ensured smooth plugin functionality[cite: 19]. - [cite_start]Delivered technical guidance to non-technical stakeholders to resolve front-end issues[cite: 20].
Jun 2024 - Aug 2024 [cite_start]Software Engineer Intern, Alysio [cite: 26] - [cite_start]Implemented Storybook to streamline React component testing and documentation[cite: 27]. - [cite_start]Used Chrome DevTools to debug and resolve 20+ UI/functional issues[cite: 28]. - [cite_start]Automated test scripts for login validation, reducing manual QA cycles[cite: 29].
May 2023 - Nov 2024 [cite_start]Software Support Technician, FamilySearch [cite: 21] - [cite_start]Automated repetitive web tasks using Selenium, cutting manual workflow time by 60%[cite: 22]. - [cite_start]Optimized 15+ application logic instances for speed and accuracy[cite: 23]. - [cite_start]Conducted 10+ software tests per week and identified critical bugs[cite: 24].





Oct 2025 [cite_start]Sales Dashboard Factory (HackUSU) [cite: 31] - [cite_start]Architected a secure data layer using Databricks SQL & Unity Catalog[cite: 33]. - [cite_start]Developed a SQL validator enforcing Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)[cite: 34]. - [cite_start]Tech Stack: Databricks, Python (Pandas), Streamlit[cite: 35].
Oct 2025 [cite_start]Santa’s Workshop [cite: 40] - [cite_start]Built a real-time gift-tracking web app using Next.js, React, and TypeScript[cite: 41]. - [cite_start]Implemented AI-powered gift recommendations with Google Genkit[cite: 42].
May 2025 - Jul 2025 [cite_start]Sing2Track [cite: 44] - [cite_start]Engineered a full-stack web application to record and process audio input[cite: 45]. - [cite_start]Developed audio analysis to convert vocal melodies into editable MIDI notes[cite: 46].



Nov 2025 [cite_start]Portfolio Web Page [cite: 36] - [cite_start]Architected a React-based portfolio featuring dynamic Tailwind CSS animations[cite: 37, 38].
Apr 2025 [cite_start]BYUI Login Extension [cite: 47] - [cite_start]Developed a Chrome extension saving users 10+ minutes daily through automated login[cite: 48]. - [cite_start]Implemented secure credential storage and auto-fill functionality[cite: 49].





[cite_start]Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++ [cite: 5]
[cite_start]Web & UI: HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS [cite: 7]
[cite_start]Cloud & Tools: AWS, SQL, Git/GitHub, Postman, Chrome DevTools [cite: 8]
[cite_start]Testing: Selenium, Storybook [cite: 9]
